name: Mom's Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Choose large, attractive tomatoes and carefully scoop out the centers, leaving the bottoms intact. Set aside inside of tomatoes.
3. Toast bread slices and cut into 1/2-inch cubes. Drizzle oil from anchovies on the bread cubes.
4. Mash or mince the anchovies into fine pieces.
5. Mix mashed anchovies, bread cubes, and the tomato centers in a bowl.
6. Add 2 tablespoons of reserved Parmesan cheese to the mixture to prevent it from becoming too watery inside the tomatoes.
7. Spoon the mixture into the hollowed-out tomatoes.
8. Sprinkle the remaining Parmesan cheese on top of each stuffed tomato.
9. Place the stuffed tomatoes in an 8-inch square cake pan and pour 1/2 inch of water around them.
10. Bake for 30 minutes in a preheated oven at 375°F.
Serves: 4
